intentSynonyms: get a file content in gitlab
look up a file content in gitlab
fetch a single file content in gitlab
view one specific file content in gitlab
read a file from a repository in gitlab
description: Read a file from a repository. Returns the decoded content as text. Use the ref parameter to read from a specific branch or commit.

project.description: Project path (e.g., "group/project") or numeric project ID

file_path.description: File path relative to repository root (e.g., "src/index.ts")

ref.description: Branch name, tag, or commit SHA (defaults to the default branch)
